data.title: Update CLAUDE.md to document architect-foundation guided mode changes
data.description:
Update CLAUDE.md to document 4 new architect-foundation behaviors. TDD exemption: static documentation file (exemption criterion 3).

Precondition: verify stories 2ea1-8454, 6d81-e870, d51a-5b1c, 018f-a01a are all closed before proceeding.

Change 1 - Add new Quick Reference row (after preplanning row, line 17):
'| Generate architectural scaffolding for an existing project | /dso:architect-foundation or /dso:architect-foundation --auto (--auto: skips Socratic dialogue, uses recommended defaults) |'

Change 2 - Add architect-foundation guided mode description. Placement: insert as a new inline paragraph in the Architecture section after the sentence ending 'Timeout budget: 15 seconds.' (end of the Test quality gate block, line 50). Follow the dense **Bold term**: explanation style of surrounding paragraphs — do NOT introduce bullet lists or subsections.

New paragraph to insert:
'**architect-foundation guided mode**: supports --auto flag (skips Socratic dialogue, selects recommended defaults from project-understanding.md with graceful error if file is missing), batched artifact confirmation (single confirmation for all N files rather than per-file prompt, with diffs for existing files), ADR always generated for session decisions without asking (deduplication keyed on decision topic), and append-only re-run idempotency (re-invocation preserves existing artifacts and appends only non-duplicate recommendations; unchanged inputs produce no file modifications).'

Verification:
- grep -ciE '--auto' CLAUDE.md ≥ 1
- grep -ciE 'batched.*confirm|single.*confirm|batched.*artifact' CLAUDE.md ≥ 1
- grep -ciE 'adr.*always|always.*generat.*adr' CLAUDE.md ≥ 1
- grep -ciE 'idempoten|append.only|append-only' CLAUDE.md ≥ 1

testing_mode: UPDATE
File: CLAUDE.md
